title: Aster's Scary Fish Lure Meal
description: 钓界禁用钓术，恐怖诱鱼粉！
body:
Just use the rod once and this mod will do the rest for you. 
Very good for AFK fishing!

This is a simple client-sided auto fishing mod that uses your fishing rod automatically.
It can also detect open water for treasure loot, just enable it in the mod settings.

Note: Please run this mod on Java 21, it is not compatible with Java 17.
